attempts.insight: First-attempt clean landing. The haveI is load-bearing: Lean does not auto-bridge the two spellings (C.left.presheaf.obj ↔ (toModuleKSheaf C).obj.obj) of the same module — they coincide via the iter-006 toModuleKPresheaf_obj simp lemma but typeclass synthesis does not chase through it. .symm flips the LinearEquiv orientation in one token to match Module.Finite.equiv's source/target convention. Theorem (NOT instance) per plan rationale to avoid silent typeclass-synthesis pollution. Kernel-only axioms verified: [propext, Classical.choice, Quot.sound].

next_steps: Combined with the iter-046+ linearised constant-sheaf-Γ homEquiv (queued), this completes the second of three building blocks for the producer instance IsHModuleHomFinite k C (toModuleKSheaf C). Iter-047+ assembles via Module.Finite.equiv chain.
